title: enhancedDragonEgg
description: Enhances the dragon egg for multiplayer servers, empowering the yielder, while also making life harder for it. Adds a twist to the most sought after item on an smp!
body:
**USE THE SERVER INVITE FOR ISSUES, ITS JUST A DM, MODRINTH WONT LEMME PUT IT IN ISSUE TRACKER**

Paper/Purpur (and its respective forks) plugin to enhance the dragon egg, making it boost a player, while also putting a target on the players back. Makes the egg no longer a cosmetic item!

When you have the Dragon Egg, you get:

Speed I
Fire Resistance I
Strength I
15 hearts instead of 10
Glowing effect (so you can find the person)

You also cant put it in any containers.

The egg is basically indestructible:

Won't blow up from TNT/creepers
Won't burn in lava or fire
Won't get destroyed by cactus
Never despawns
If it somehow falls into the void, it teleports back to spawn

Tracking features:

Shows coordinates when you drop or place it
Use /eggcoords or /dragoneggcoords to find it anytime
Dropped eggs glow so you can spot them easily
/eggholder to check who has egg

MISCELLANEOUS:
/egg place to toggle placing the egg (off by default)

And **ALL** of these options are configurable :>
enjoy!
